use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and page actions
Secondary actions with outline or ghost variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
Destructive action buttons with warning styling
Accessible link-style buttons for inline navigation
ai_summary: A versatile Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class variance authority, featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Includes shadow effects, focus-visible outlines for accessibility, disabled states, and supports composition via the asChild prop. Designed as a reusable primitive for any UI system.
